Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add comprehensive project outline document

This document covers the complete system architecture, hardware requirements,
software stack, API design, database schema, web interface mockups,
communication protocol, and implementation roadmap for the PiZero Generator
Control project.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Tailscale and Cloudflare Tunnel networking sections

Adds comprehensive Section 14 covering remote access architecture:
- Tailscale as required mesh VPN with Docker integration
- Optional Cloudflare Tunnel for public access
- Memory budget analysis, nginx config, and setup script integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(for f in DashboardView.vue HistoryView.vue GenSlaveView.vue)

Bash(gh pr create --title "GenSlave improvements: dedicated page and IP configuration" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary

- Move GenSlave tab content from System page to dedicated GenSlave page in top navigation
- Add GenSlave IP address configuration with container /etc/hosts support
- Fix default GenSlave port from 8000 to 8001

## Changes

### GenSlave Page Improvements
- Replaced simple GenSlaveView with comprehensive content previously in SystemView
- Includes ARM/DISARM relay control, failsafe monitoring, system metrics
- Added Connection Settings with Host Resolution section for IP configuration
- Removed GenSlave tab from SystemView \(now has Health, Network, Terminal tabs only\)

### GenSlave IP Configuration
- **Backend**: Added `genslave_ip` and `genslave_hostname` fields to config model/schema/router
- **Database**: New migration adds columns and updates default port from 8000 to 8001
- **Setup.sh**: Stores GENSLAVE_IP/HOSTNAME in .env and adds `extra_hosts` to docker-compose
- **Frontend**: New UI section for configuring hostname and IP address

### Port Fix
- Changed default GenSlave URL from `http://genslave:8000` to `http://genslave:8001`
- Migration updates existing records with the correct port

## Test plan
- [ ] Run setup.sh and verify it prompts for GenSlave IP address
- [ ] Verify /etc/hosts entry is created on host system
- [ ] Verify docker-compose includes extra_hosts directive
- [ ] Test GenSlave page loads with all sections \(status, relay control, metrics, settings\)
- [ ] Test connection settings save and load correctly
- [ ] Run database migration and verify new columns exist

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh pr create --title "Fix migration SQL bind parameter issue" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary

Fix the database migration that was failing due to SQLAlchemy interpreting `:8000` and `:8001` as bind parameters.

## Changes

- Wrap UPDATE statements in `text\(\)` to prevent SQLAlchemy from treating port numbers as bind parameters
- This fixes the error: `A value is required for bind parameter ''8000''`

## Test plan
- [ ] Run `alembic upgrade head` and verify migration completes successfully

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh pr create --title "Remove problematic UPDATE from migration" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary

Remove the slave_api_url port update from migration to avoid SQLAlchemy bind parameter issues.

## Changes

- Removed UPDATE statements that were causing `A value is required for bind parameter ''8000''` error
- Migration now just adds the two new columns \(`genslave_ip` and `genslave_hostname`\)
- The model default is already `:8001`, users can update existing URLs via UI

## Test plan
- [ ] Run `alembic upgrade head` and verify migration completes successfully

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh pr create --title "GenSlave enhancements: API auth, documentation, and fixes" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary

This PR adds several enhancements to GenSlave:

- **API Key Authentication**: All `/api/*` endpoints now require `X-API-Key` header authentication
- **Comprehensive Documentation**: Complete README.md for GenSlave with full API reference
- **GenSlave Configuration UI**: Move GenSlave settings to dedicated page in GenMaster
- **Bug Fixes**: Migration SQL fixes and default port configuration

## Changes

### API Authentication
- Add `auth.py` with X-API-Key header verification
- Apply authentication to all API routers via dependencies
- Keep root endpoint `/` public for basic health checks
- Auth disabled if `GENSLAVE_API_SECRET` not configured \(dev mode\)

### Documentation \(genslave/README.md\)
- Hardware requirements
- Installation instructions
- Full configuration reference
- Complete API endpoint documentation with examples
- LCD display states explanation
- Failsafe system documentation
- Headless Pi management guide
- Troubleshooting section

### GenMaster UI
- Move GenSlave tab from System page to dedicated GenSlave page
- Add GenSlave IP/hostname configuration
- Fix default port handling

### Bug Fixes
- Fix migration SQL bind parameter issues
- Remove problematic UPDATE from migration

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify API endpoints reject requests without X-API-Key header
- [ ] Verify API endpoints accept requests with valid X-API-Key
- [ ] Verify GenSlave page loads correctly in GenMaster UI
- [ ] Verify GenSlave configuration can be saved
- [ ] Review README documentation for accuracy


🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
